title: (Company Secretaries Act,1980) the company Secretaries Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board and Terms and conditions of service and Allowances of the Chairpersons and Members of the Board rules 2006

Shri Bhagawat Swarup, Ex-Member, Central Board of Direct Taxes, C-241, Ground Floor, Defence Colony, New Delhi-110024 2. Shri Ravi (Ravindra) Kastia, Group Executive President and Business Head, Aditya Birla Group, Aditya Birla Centre, Mumbai-400030 3. Shri Rakesh Chandra, Director, Inspection and Investigation, M/o Corporate Affairs , Nominees of the Council 4. Shri Keyoor Bakshi, Vice-President, Institute of Company Secretaries of India 5. Shri Harish K. Vaid, Council Member, Institute of Company Secretaries of India Chairperson Member Member Member Member. 2. The terms and condition of service and allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Quality Review Boajrd shall be governed by the Company Secretaries Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board, Rules, 2006. 3. This notification shall come into force with effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. • [RNO.5/2/2007-CL-V] JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy.
